title: UMWE AMIZANGA
subtitle: One there is who Loves Thee
author: unknown

title: NGULI NA TUMBI
subtitle: I have a Saviour
author: unknown
verses: Vivevo vya kufwa awanyine ha mavu

title: ETU TUNEVU NGWAVO
author: unknown
verses: Muka-zangi ava zanga vose va ha mavu.
Atumine Yesu kupwa Tumbi wa kuhasa
Kutulwila ku shili yetu ya kuneha kufwa.
Vatu vose va ha mavu, shikaho afwile,
Etu tunevu ceka mazu kana lelo,

title: MAZU AMWENEMWENE
subtitle: The Church’s One Foundation
author: unknown
verses: Shimbu apwile mwilu mu lifuci lyenyi,
Na kuvalweza vatu likoji lya Ise.

title: MWANA-KALUNGA AFUMINE MWILU
subtitle: Take time to be Holy
author: unknown
verses: Na vamyumbwe nawa vali na mena.

title: KU MAFUCI OSENA
subtitle: Wide, Wide as the Ocean
author: unknown
verses: Ku mafuci osena, kuli vatu vosena,
Cipwe ngu muka-shili lyaheta kuli ami,

title: LWEZENU PUHO YA YESU
subtitle: Tell me the story of Jesus
author: unknown

title: IYA MWANGUTOMESA
subtitle: What can Wash away My Stain
author: unknown

title: UKAMULUKA LIJINA LYENYI
author: unknown
verses: Mwakalwila vatu jenyi ku milonga yavo.

title: LUKUMBI LIMWE SHIMBU
subtitle: One Day
author: unknown
verses: Shili ya vatu na kufwa cavo,

title: VAVAVULU NAVEZA KULI YESU
subtitle: Coming, Coming yes they Are
author: unknown
verses: Navafuma ku mafuci na ku membo osena,
Na kulita kuli Tumbi eji kuvazanganga.
Vatu va miyaci yose, velava na vatoma,
Tumbi yavo umwe kaha, Yesu Mwana-Kalunga.
Ku kufwa vanalikokela na milonga yavo.
Enu nawa mwamisaka mwize kuli Ikiye,
Wose mwevwa lizu lyenyi apandame linwomu.

title: SHILI INAPIHI VENE
author: unknown
verses: :Ngoco mwakaheta mwilu mu nganda ya setu:

title: NGWIMBILENU CEKA MAZU
subtitle: Sing them over again to me
author: unknown

title: TALA KU KULUSU
subtitle: There is Life for a Look
author: unknown
verses: Tala ku kulusu umone Mwata Yesu,
Tambula cawana kuyoya ca ha myaka,

title: MUTU AYILE KULI MWATA
subtitle: A Ruler once Came
author: unknown
verses: A vyuma vya mwilu na vya ulwilo.

title: VASOPESELE MWATA
subtitle: I’ll be a Friend to Jesus
author: unknown

title: MAZU OVE A ZANGI
subtitle: The Gospel of Thy Grace
author: unknown
verses: Fweto ya shili kufwa, mwanambe Kalunga.

title: LIKUMI LYA VAJIKE
subtitle: Ten Virgins
author: unknown
verses: Likumi lya vajike na monongo avo,
Kaweshi kutamo na yetu na yenu,

title: NGWAMBULILE VYA YESU
subtitle: Tell me the old old Story
author: unknown
verses: Ngwambulile vya Yesu vya upahu wa mwilu,
Mwomwo ngweji kukatala na kuhona ngolo.
chorus: Ngwambulile vya Yesu, vya zangi alinayo,

title: OMU PETULU NA YOWANO
author: unknown
verses: Omu Petulu na Yowano vapwile na kukanduka
Ha lwola luze lwa kulomba, ha lwola lwa kulombela.
Omu Petulu na Yowano vamwambile ngwavo,
Tala Palata cipwe ulu pimbi muli Yesu utambuke.
Omu Petulu na Yowano vamukafwile kwimana
Kaha atambukile vene na kulemesa Kalunga.
Ove mukwetu uli muno Mwangana Yesu nahase
Kukulwila ku shili yove umwalisenga Kalunga.
Manyinga enyi anatemo kukusokola ku shili.

title: MUKIKO MWAVAZANGILILE
author: unknown
verses: God’s Love (Tune: The Love of God)
Mukiko mwavazangilile Kalunga vose ha mavu,
Na kuvahanyina mwan’enyi umwe kaha-Mwata Yesu.
Kaci nge Kalunga Yehova atuzangile ngoco
Kaha catela kuli etu kulizanganga nawa. (1 Yowano 4:11)
Shinganyeka omu yaya zangi kana natuzange Setu
Kutuvuluka ngwenyi, hi tuvana va Kalunga.
Kutuzanga omu twapwile tuvaka-shili kaha. ( 1 Yowano

title: CIPWE WALIMA CIKUMA
author: unknown
chorus: Utale ku kulusu, kuze kuli Mulwilo;

title: IVWENU MUJIMBU WAMWAZA
subtitle: Oh, Listen to our Wondrous Story
author: unknown

title: MUNEVU VASUKIKILE YESU
subtitle: When I think how they Crucified
author: unknown

title: VAZE VEYA KU KALWIJI
subtitle: Sweeping through the Gates
author: unknown
verses: Vaze veya ku kalwiji wa kufwa

title: SETU TUNAKUSAKWILILA
subtitle: Oh for a thousand Toungues
author: unknown
verses: Setu tunakusakwilila ha zangi yove na likoji nawa
Vafu mu vimbumbe navevwa lizu lya Mwata

title: MWATA YESU NGWENYI
subtitle: The Way, the Truth, the Life
author: unknown

title: E’LILOLWA LYA KU MBANGO
subtitle: The Corner Stone
author: unknown
verses: E’lilolwa lya ku mbango lya cikungulwilo,
Likiko Yesu Mulwilo, Mulwilo wa vatu.
Mwaso wami nangukemba mwilu haya myaka,
Cikiko Yesu Mulwilo mucano na jila.
chorus: Lijina lyeka pimbi mukaci ka vatu

title: TWAYENU MUVOSENA NA KWIVWA
subtitle: Welcome to our Sunday School
author: unknown
verses: Mazu a Mwata Yesu a kuyoyesa,

title: YESU ALI NA KUZANGA
subtitle: Jesus loves the little children
author: unknown
verses: Yesu ali nakuzanga vatu vose ha mavu
Na vatu velava na vacila na vatoma

title: HAZE NGWEVWILE LIZU
subtitle: Alpha and Omega
author: unknown
verses: Tata na mama na yove ndumbwami

title: CAMWENEMWENE YESU NGWENYI
subtitle: He that hears My Voice
author: unknown
verses: Na kufwelela kuli Kalunga, uze angutumine,
Ali na mwono wa myaka yosena.

title: KEJILEKO NA KUSOPESA
subtitle: He did not come to Judge
author: unknown
verses: Vamuluka Mulwilo wetu lijina lya Yesu.

title: AMI NGUJILA
author: unknown
verses: Mutu na umwe pimbi mwahasa kuya kuli Tata,

title: NGUNANYINGIKA UMWE AFWILE
subtitle: I Know of One
author: unknown
verses: Kaha mweza ceka na kungutambula vene.

title: MUCIMA WELAVILE
subtitle: My Heart was Black
author: unknown
verses: Nangukatambuka mwilu ha mukombwela wa ulu.

title: NGO, NGO, NGO, NGO
subtitle: Behold I Stand
author: unknown
verses: Ku cikolo ca mucima wa yove.

title: COSE NAWIVWA MAZU A YESU
subtitle: Rescue the Perishing
author: unknown
verses: Ikiye ali na ngolo na zangi,

title: IVWAKO MUKWETU KU MAZU
subtitle: Hark, Sinner!
author: unknown
verses: Ivwako, mukwetu ku mazu a Yesu,

title: LELO NAWA MUNEVUKO
subtitle: Once Again
author: unknown
verses: Lelo nawa munevuko mazu a Mwata Yesu,
Myaka kana yinahici mwahunguka na shili.
Milima nayiza washi ya ufuku wa kufwa.

title: MUNGWAPWILA NA KUHONA
subtitle: Just as I Am
author: unknown
verses: Mungwapwila na kuhona ca kulisambisa naco,
Mungwapwila, ngunayande na woma wa ha milonga.
Mungwapwila, na utonji, mangana na ngolo pimbi,
Nguviwane kuli Ove, shikaho, Mwata, nguneza.
Mungwapwila, zangi yove yinangukoko na ngolo.

title: NGULI NA KUKUFWELELA
subtitle: I am Trusting Thee
author: unknown
verses: Palanga na ha kuheta ku nganda yove.
chorus: Mwata Yesu nangufwelela kuli ove Mwata

title: UNEVU MAZU A LIKOJI
subtitle: Almost Persuaded
author: unknown
verses: Mu Sali ya kufwa kamweshi ulwilo

title: OVE WAHONA KUYOYA
subtitle: What Will You Do?
author: unknown
verses: Ha kukana Mwata Yesu, naukalinga ngacilihi?
Ha likumbi lya kusopa naukalinga ngacilihi?

title: ACI NGULAMENGAKO
subtitle: Jesus, Keep Me
author: unknown
verses: Jila ya kuya mwilu yili kuli Ove
Ngolo ja ku mucima ja kukavang’Ove,
Nguli na kujilomba, na mangana nawa.
chorus: Ove uli na ngolo ja kungulamanga.

title: IVWILILA KULI AMI
subtitle: Pas Me Not
author: unknown
verses: Ove u Tumbi ya vatu, ngulwile ami.
Nanguunda mu mucima na mazu ove

title: NGUNEVU LIZU LYOVE
subtitle: I hear Thy welcome voice
author: unknown
verses: Cipwe ami ngumupi, cipwe ngolo pimbi,

title: IVWENU MUVOSE
subtitle: Steal Away
author: unknown
verses: Muze mwamwaza kaha, cipwe kufwa pimbi.

title: MUZE MU NGETESEMANE
subtitle: It was Alone
author: unknown
verses: Cipwe Ise amwecele afwe uka wenyi.

title: YESU ALI NA KWIMANA
subtitle: Behold Me Standing
author: unknown
verses: Yesu ali na kwimana ku mucima wove lelo.
Na kwihula na zangi yenyi ngwenyi, ngwingile tahi,
Anuka vihuli vyose vize amwene halyove,

title: MWATA YESU AZANGA
subtitle: Somewheree the Sun
author: unknown
verses: Yesu amifwilile. Ku kulusu ya sonyi.

title: MUTU WAMBALA WA MWATA
subtitle: Where is my wondering Boy
author: unknown
verses: Mutu wambala wa Mwata ajimbalile lyehi,
Ayile mu jila ya shili, alihonesa lyehi.
Washishikile ha mwaka, wapwile na Kalunga.
Jino welava, wajiluka, wahenga na milonga.
Walombelenga ha mwaka, na kuya na kutanga.
Jino wahengesa, walinga vyuma vya kupihisa.
Kaha mwakuhilwisa ceka na ngolo na kujila.
chorus: Weji kumwivwisa ushona hiluka kuli Setu.

title: OVE MULWILO WAMI
subtitle: Thou Didst Leave Thy Throne
author: unknown
verses: Ove Mulwilo wami, wejile ha mavu
Wambile ngwove, Tujila vali na maswa,
Nawiza, Ove Mwata, na upahu wove,

title: NGWATAMBUKILE MU PAMBO
subtitle: Springs of Living Water
author: unknown
verses: Ou mwanwa keshi kwivwa ceka lipwila

title: KANDA TUVANDAMINA
subtitle: Wiat not till the Shadows Lengthen
author: unknown

title: HA MWAKA VAISALELE
subtitle: When God of Old
author: unknown
verses: Ha mwaka vaIsalele vapwile mu undungo
Kuli mwanangana Fwalo mu lifu lyenyi.
Kuli mwanangana Fwalo na va Ejipitu.
Vatwatwa javo vosena ha ufuku umwe.
Satana, nge uze Fwalo ali na vandungo,
Eli lizu lya Kalunga, lya mucano vene,

title: ETU TWEJI KULIMA
subtitle: We Plough the Fields
author: unknown
verses: Na tunyama, na tujila, na vaishi nawa.
Vitondo vya ha mavu, kakweji wa mwilu,
Na yetu vatu nawa natuhane mwono.

title: TWALENU MICIMA YENU
subtitle: Now in a Song
author: unknown
verses: Keshi ku vyuma vya ha mavuko,
Mwomwo vyuma vya hano ha mavu

title: OVE YESU TUMBI YETU
author: unknown
verses: Kaha jino uli mwilu hamwe na Iso.
Na micima yetu yose myaka na myaka.
Cipwe malwa cipwe kufwa muze mwapimbi,

title: KACI ULI NA KUMONA VIHULI
subtitle: When Upon Life’s Billows
author: unknown
verses: Kaci unapu nge wato ha lwiji
Kaci uli na lwiso mu mucima,
Na zuvo yamwaza mu nganda yenyi.

title: YESU MWATUSANYIKA
subtitle: Down in the Valley
author: unknown
verses: Natwijiva kuya ku nganda ya Kalunga,

title: TUMBI YETU YESU
subtitle: Jesus is Our Shepherd
author: unknown
verses: Mu nganda ya mwilu na Mwata wetu.

title: MASWALALE JA YESU
subtitle: Onword, Christian Solders
author: unknown
verses: Maswalale ja Yesu, yenu ku jita,
Lipandelo lya Yesu lili ku lutwe,
Vosena vamwe kaha, na Mwata umwe,
Lufwelelo lwetu lumwe na zangi yimwe.
Mazu a Yesu nawa kaweshi kunonga.
chorus: Maswalale ja Kulishitu, yenu ku jita,

title: OMU MAVWI ELAVA
subtitle: Just when I am Disheartened
author: unknown
verses: Omu mu jila yami nangumona malwa,
Cosena nanguyanda na malwa a ha mavu,

title: YEHOVA NATUSHIKI NAMBE
subtitle: The Lord hath Declared
author: unknown
chorus: Ku myaka! Ku myaka! Nyi lelo kaha?

title: KU KUFWA CA MWATA WETU
subtitle: Through the Love of God Our Saviour
author: unknown
verses: Ku kufwa ca Mwata wetu, tunayoyo.
Setu eji kutuzanga, natuhane vyuma vyose,

title: MUKA-KUWAHISA
subtitle: Oh Spread the Tidings Round
author: unknown
verses: Cinjikizo cino ca zangi ya Mwata,

title: TUNAWAHILILA MULI MWATA
subtitle: We Love to Sing of the Lord
author: unknown

title: LIKUMBI LYA LELO
subtitle: The Day Thou Gavest
author: unknown
verses: Na ufuku uno mu milima yawo,
Cipwe ha musana, cipwe ha ufuku,
Ku lifuci limwe vali na musana,
Cipwe nge vaze va mu lifuci limwe

title: AYANJILE AYANJILE
subtitle: Wounded for Me
author: unknown
verses: Nguli na mwono wa haya myaka,

title: VAKA-KWITAVA VOSENA
subtitle: Blest be the Tie that Binds
author: unknown

title: NGWEVWILE LIZU LYA MWATA
subtitle: I Heard the Voice of Jesus Say
author: unknown

title: NGWAPWILE KWAKUSUKU
subtitle: Trusting in Jesus
author: unknown
verses: Na ha ufuku na ha musana,

title: NATUMUKAVANGIZA MWATA
subtitle: Trying to Walk in the Step
author: unknown

title: NGUNAMILEMBELELA
subtitle: Who at My Door is Standing?
author: unknown

title: MOSE ASAKWILE VIHULI
subtitle: Choosing
author: unknown
chorus: Keshi nge vya ku meso kaha;

title: KACI UNANGUZANGE CIKUMA
subtitle: If You Love Me
author: unknown
verses: Mwomwo vyose vya hano ha mavu

title: KU KULUSU YA KAVALI
author: unknown
verses: Ku kulusu ya kavali kuze amwene
Kanda tupwa na micima ya kuzeyako,
chorus: Katweshi na womako, tuvana venyi jino,

title: VATU KAVESHI KWITAVA
author: unknown
verses: Vatu kaveshi kwitava kaveshi na mwonoko,
Tunapu mwenga wa Mwata tuli nakuya mwilu,
:Keke na ngolo na upahu wose vipwe vyenyi:

title: TWIMBENUNGA MYASO YETU
author: unknown
verses: Mwimbilenu na jingunda na myaso na visaji.
Twimbenu na kukangwoka kuli SetuMwata wa ngolo,
:Mwimbilenu na jingunda na myaso na visaji:
Vayilenga mu jila na kuheta kulwiji,
Vamwene vaEjipitu naveza mu nyima na jita,
Valifukwile ha mavu na kwalisa Yehova,
Na vingazule ja Fwalo vafwile mu kalungalwiji.
Numbaze ami ha kufwa nangukalinga sika?
Na lilu na mavu navikacina ku meswenyi.
Nangutuka nge katela nguyenga mu nganda ya

title: LAMENU , LAMENU MESWENU
subtitle: Oh, be Careful
author: unknown
chorus: Mwata Yesu mwamona mu micima yosena,

title: ZAU NA LELO
subtitle: Yesterday, Today,
author: unknown
verses: Zau na lelo, na haya myaka

title: NATUMULEMESA
subtitle: It will be worth it all
author: unknown

title: MWATA YESU NANGULWILI
author: unknown
tunename: Jesus is all the Word to me

title: HANGA MWATA ENGILILE
subtitle: Since Jesus Came into My Heart
author: unknown

title: ANGUFUMISHILE MU MALOVA
subtitle: He Took Me Out of the Pit
author: unknown

title: NGWAWANYINE MWATA YESU
subtitle: I Met Jesus at the Crossroads
author: unknown

title: NGUNATOKWA YESU
subtitle: I’m so Hapnpy
author: unknown
verses: Yesu ali na kutambuka na yami,

title: MU MUCIMA WAMI
subtitle: In My Heart there Rings
author: unknown
verses: Mwaso nguli nawo, nangwimba haya myaka.

title: TWEJI KULISAMBILANGA
subtitle: Joy, Joy, My Heart is Full of Joy
author: unknown

title: WAHILILENU NA KWIMBA
subtitle: When We All Get to Heaven
author: unknown

title: KWOSENA NA YESU
subtitle: Anywhere With Jesus
author: unknown
verses: Kwose na Yesu nguli na sepa

title: CEKA NAWA, OVE MWATA
subtitle: Saviour, Again to Thy Dear Name
author: unknown
verses: Na zangi yove ku membo etu
Mu malw’awa a hano ha mavu.

title: KUPAYA CAMI MWATA
subtitle: All Because of Calvary
author: unknown
verses: Mulwilo wami ali mu mucima jino,

title: TWAMINA, VANGUTWAMINYINEKO
subtitle: Lead, Kingly Light
author: unknown
verses: Mu milima ya hano ha mavu.

title: VIZE VYA KUMUCIMA WOVE
subtitle: Thou sweet beloved will
author: unknown
verses: Ku mavoko a naye a ngolo,

title: MWATA YESU NGUHANE
subtitle: Give Me a Heart Like Thine
author: unknown
verses: Nge wa Yove, wa kuzanga vatu.
Vali na kufwa, vali na malwa a myaka na myaka
Na zangi kaha wavafwilile mangana vayoye.

title: AMI NGWAKUFWILILE
subtitle: Thy Life was Given for Me
author: unknown
verses: Ngwazanga mucima wove, ulyece kuli Ami.

title: NANGUMUKAVA MWANGANA
subtitle: I Have Decided to Follow Jesus
author: unknown

title: TAMBULA MWONO WAMI
subtitle: Take My Life and Let it Be
author: unknown

title: OVE MWATA YESU KU MAKANGO
subtitle: Break Thou the Bread of Life
author: unknown

title: HANJIKA KULI AMI
subtitle: Speak to My Soul, Lord Jesus
author: unknown
verses: Hanjika kuli ami; Ove Mwata wami,
Yeveta mu litwitwi mazu a likoji.
Zangi nge yize yove kayeshi kwekako.
Uli na kuvakinga, vevwe ngolo jove,
Musana na ufuku uli navo hamwe.
Kuli tumbaji twove, vya vyuma vya mwilu,
chorus: Mazu Ove a zangi, ngutwamenga nawo.

title: OVE MWANANGANA WAMI
subtitle: Master, Speak
author: unknown
verses: Ove Mwanangana wami, hanjika kuli ami.
Nguli na kukwivwilila, ngwivwenga lizu lyove,
Ove Mwanangana wami, hanjika kuli ami.
Lizu lyove lihetenga swi mu mucima wami,
Ove Mwanangana wami, hanjika kuli ami.
Lizu lyove lingwanune, ami ngundungo yove.

title: MUKANDA WA MAZU
subtitle: Oh Wonderful Wonderful Word
author: unknown
verses: Mukanda wa mazu a Mwata wetu,
Mukanda wa mazu a Mwata wetu,
Mukanda wa mazu a Mwata wetu,
Mukanda wa mazu a Mwata wetu,

title: MUKANDA WA KALUNGA
subtitle: The Bible Stands
author: unknown
chorus: Wa kukola mbe hamwe nge lilolwa,

title: MUKANDA WA JILA
subtitle: Precious Holy Bible
author: unknown
verses: Mukanda wa jila, mazwa a Kalunga
Linongo mu jila, mazu a mwono

title: NGUNEVU MAZWOVE
subtitle: I Hear the Words of Love
author: unknown

title: MAZU A KALUNG’AWA
subtitle: God’s Word is like a Hammers
author: unknown

title: KU MAFUCI VATU VALI
subtitle: Far Far Away
author: unknown
verses: Ku mafuci vatu vali na kufwa
Mazu a mwono wa haya myaka?
Kwose ku mafuci eka na eka

title: TWEJI KUKUVANGA MBUTO
subtitle: Sowing in the Morning
author: unknown
verses: Mwomwo mazu awa mbuto jetu vene
Na Ivene nawa na mazu a ngolo

title: KUVENU MBUTO
subtitle: Sow the seed
author: unknown
verses: Kuvenu mbuto na ku songo ja mafuci,
Ku mafuci na mucima wa keke,
Kuvenu mbuto na zangi na mucano,

title: TWALENU MUJIMBU KULI
subtitle: There’s a Call
author: unknown
verses: Mazu a likoji lya Mwata Yesu,

title: TULI NA MUKA-KASENDO
subtitle: What a Friend We Have in Jesus
author: unknown

title: VIHULI VYAMI VYOSENA
subtitle: I Know My Heavenly Father Knows
author: unknown

title: KANDA NAWIVWANGA WOMAKO
subtitle: God Will Take Care of You
author: unknown

title: KAKWESHI SEPA NGE MWATA
subtitle: Ther’s Not a Friend
author: unknown
verses: Na ha musana na ha ufuku,

title: CIPWE NGULI NA KWIVWA
subtitle: When Peace Like a River
author: unknown
verses: Cipwe nguli na kwivwa keke kaha,
Shili yami yose, keshi ya cimbwako,

title: NGULI KU TUNGI YA KALUNGA
subtitle: Under His Wings
author: unknown
verses: Nguli ku tungi ya Kalunga kami,
Nguli ku tungi ya Kalunga kami,
Nguli ku tungi ya Kalunga kami,

title: IVENE YEHOVA KAFUNGA
subtitle: In Shady Green Pastures
author: unknown
verses: Ku vyuma vya mwaza hi mwatutwala,
chorus: Cipwe mu kahya, ali na yetu,
Na ha ufuku na ha musana.

title: TUNEZA NA KULOMBA
subtitle: ‘Tis the Blessed Hour
author: unknown
verses: Likoji ali nalyo, keshi na uminyi,
Ali na zangi kaha mu mucima wenyi.
Tuunde mu micima, twivwe keke kaha.

title: TUNASAKE YESU MWATA
subtitle: Here from the World We Turn
author: unknown
verses: Na mazu a Mwata, atomese micima,

title: KALUNGA NATUKULOMBA
subtitle: There Shall Be Showers of Blessing
author: unknown

title: NGOLO JOVE JISOLOKE
subtitle: Revive Thy Work, O Lord
author: unknown
verses: Ava vali mu’ndungo mu shili yavo

title: HA CINGOLOSHI VATWALILE
subtitle: At Even Ere the Sun Was Set
author: unknown

title: HALI OVE KALUNGA
subtitle: To Thee I Lift My Soul
author: unknown

title: SETU WA KUTWAMA MWILU
subtitle: Father in High Heaven
author: unknown
verses: Na ku ngolo ja vyuma vyenyi,

title: NDANYELE APWILENGA
subtitle: Daniel was a Man of Prayer
author: unknown

title: YEHOVA WAJILA
subtitle: Holy, Holy, Holy
author: unknown
verses: Na mwaka na lelo, naku myaka yosena.

title: TUMUSAKWILILENU
subtitle: Let Us with a Gladsome Mind
author: unknown

title: CITELI CA MILONGA YAMI
subtitle: The Trusting Heart to Jesus Clings
author: unknown

title: ENU VAKA-KUJILA
subtitle: Come Ye that Love the Lord
author: unknown

title: LIKUMBI LINATOKO
subtitle: Day Is Dying in the West
author: unknown
verses: Upahu wa Mwata wetu, muze mwilu.

title: OVE UKALUNGA KAMI YEHOVA
subtitle: How Great Thou Art
author: unknown
verses: Tengeso yove, na melu na mavu,

title: OVE USETU
subtitle: Great Is Thy Faithfulness
author: unknown
verses: Vyuma vyosena vya hano ha mavu,
Wa zangi yove na keke yove.
Na ngolo jove, na kuzanga cove,
chorus: Vyuma vya mwaza vyose tuli navyo,

title: VULYE MWANGANA WAMI
subtitle: All Hail the Power
author: unknown
verses: Twimbe mwaso wa haya myaka na myaka yosena,

title: HOZANA! HOZANA!
author: unknown
verses: Atokwa Ou mweza mu lijina lya Yehova!
Na mwilu, na mwilu, na mwilu Hozana!

title: KULISHITU ALYECELE
subtitle: Christ Has for Sin Atonement Made
author: unknown

title: YEHOVA TUTWAMINYINE
subtitle: Guide Me, Oh Thou Great Jehovah
author: unknown

title: TWAMA NETU OVE SAMATANGA
subtitle: Abide With Me
author: unknown
verses: Na ngolo ja Yove mu micima,

title: MWATA TUNEZA KULI OVE
subtitle: Lord Jesus Christ, We Seek Thy Face
author: unknown

title: OMU NANGUTALISA MUCIMA
subtitle: When I Survey the Wondrous Cross
author: unknown
verses: Ku kufwa ca Yesu, Tumbi yami
Ku mutwe na ku mavoko enyi
Na ku mahinji na ku luhaci

title: MULWILO WAMI AFWILE
subtitle: Alas and Did My Saviour Bleed
author: unknown

title: CAHASHILEKO KUTACIKIZA
subtitle: They Nailed My Lord Upon the Tree
author: unknown

title: VAJIHILE MWATA YESU
subtitle: Christ Has Done the Mighty Work
author: unknown

title: OVE YESU MWATA WA MWILU
subtitle: Thy Broken Body, Gracious Lord
author: unknown
verses: Na meso a ku micima yetu.

title: TUNAMONO HA MESA
subtitle: For the Bread and for the Wine
author: unknown

title: ZANGI YA MWATA KUTOHWAYO
subtitle: How Greatly Jesus Must Have Loved Me
author: unknown

title: TWIMBENU MWASO WA KEKE
subtitle: Let Us Sing of the Wonderful Mercy
author: unknown
verses: Twimbenu mwaso wa keke ya Kalunga,
Mucima wenyi wa zangi tuli nawo

title: OVE YESU TUNAWAHE
subtitle: Thy Name We Bless
author: unknown
verses: Ove Yesu, tunawahe na zangi yove kaha,
Tunayimono kukufwa cove ca ku kulusu.
Etu twapayile vene, oloze Ove Yesu
Omu wapwile na kufwa, Ove ngwove, Cinahu,
Tunaundu na mazu ove mu micima yetu,
Ha mwaka twacikimine ha kwanuka milonga.
Woma wa kutucikimisa katweshi nawo jino.
Ove Yesu, Tumbi yetu, cipwe hano ha kaye
Tunaputuka na ku shinganyeka kufwa cove.
Natukacanukanga mwilu ha myaka na ha myaka.

title: KULI LIJINA LINAWAHE
subtitle: There is A Name I Love to Hear
author: unknown

title: VYUMA VYA HA MAVU
subtitle: Not All the Blood of Beasts
author: unknown

title: OVE MULWILO WA VATU
subtitle: Jesus the Very Thought of Thee
author: unknown

title: TWIMBENU MWASO WA KULEMESA
subtitle: Now in a Song of Grateful Praise
author: unknown

title: YESU MWATA WAMI
subtitle: My Jesus I Love Thee
author: unknown
verses: Mwomwo wanguzangile palanga na ku kufwa,
Mu upahu wove, mu nganda yove,

title: MWATA WETU NATUKWALISA
subtitle: Jesus Our Lord, With What Joy
author: unknown
verses: Tuli na kutwama ku meso Ove.

title: LEMESENU YESU
subtitle: Praise Him, Praise Him
author: unknown
verses: Na mwilu na ha mavu hosena.

title: ZANGI YOVE MWATA
subtitle: Saviour Thy Dying Love
author: unknown
verses: Na vyuma vya lelo evi ngwa mona,
Na vyuma vya mwilu ovyo nanguwana.
Vyosena vya yami vipwenga vya Yove,
Mucima, na mwono, na ngolo jose.

title: OVE MWATA WETU KALUNGA
subtitle: Worthy Art Thou
author: unknown
verses: Na ufuku nawa na kwamba ngwavo,
Na wanangana haya myaka na myaka. Amen (Kusoloka 1:5-

title: KUNGULWILA CAPWA
subtitle: And Can It Be
author: unknown
verses: O zangi kana ya Kalung’omwo yapwila!
Ngwafwile ku cisemwa ca ha mavu.
O zangi kana! Undungo wami unahu,
Jino nangupwanga na Mulwilo wami hamwe.

title: NANGWIMBA MWASO
subtitle: I Will Sing of My Redeemer
author: unknown

title: MILIMO YA MWATA YESU
subtitle: For All the Lord Has Done
author: unknown

title: ZANGI YA MWANA KALUNGA
subtitle: It Was Not Dying Love Alone
author: unknown

title: LIKOJI LYA MWATA YESU
subtitle: The Love that Jesus Had for Me
author: unknown

title: VANATUMBITWILA MALENGE
subtitle: My Chains are Snapped
author: unknown
verses: Ngolo ja kufwa neji ja cimbumbe

title: IVENE AFWILE
subtitle: Low in the Grave He Lay
author: unknown

title: NAUKEZA OVE MWATA
subtitle: Thou Art Coming, O My Saviour
author: unknown

title: HA CIMENE PAMO
subtitle: It May Be at Morn
author: unknown
verses: Ha cimene pamo, ha kwiza ca likumbi,
Ha mulungu pamo, cipwe ha citeuko,
Cipwe mu milima yawi ya ufuku,
Kaci shimbu tucili na kuyoya hano

title: YESU MWAKEZA
subtitle: Jesus is Coming, Sing the Glad Word
author: unknown

title: IVWENU, IVWENU MAZU
subtitle: Hark, Hark Hear,
author: unknown
verses: : Mwata Yesu, Mwata Yesu wa mwilu:

title: OMU NAVAKEMBA PUNGA
subtitle: When the Roll is Called
author: unknown
verses: Omu navakemba punga ya kusanyika vatu
Ha kukuma ca vyuma vya ha mavu,
Omu naukaca ufuku wa shili na kufwa,
Omu vatu ja Mwata navakasanguka nenyi
Jino ngumuzacile Mwata na mucima wose,
Ngukambulule kwosena na ku likumbi kana,

title: NATUSHIKI MWAKAHILUKA
subtitle: The Rapture In the Sweet Bye and Bye
author: unknown

title: KULI MWATA WATUZANGA
subtitle: With Harps and with Vials
author: unknown
verses: Vali na kwimba myaso ya kumwalisa.
Ngoco lelo vanatwame na ku wahilila
Ku meso a Mwata Yesu ali mwilu.

title: COSENA NANGUKAMANYISA
subtitle: When my Life-work is Ended
author: unknown
verses: Omu nangukamona meso a Tumbi yami,

title: MWANGANA WETU YESU, KAKWESHI
subtitle: The Sands of Time
author: unknown
verses: Atuzanga nge Ove, na umwe pimbi vene.
Mu myaka yetu yose tweji kumonanga
Luyando na ushona ku vyuma vya ha mavu.
Ami ngumutu wove, Ove Mwata wami,
Unangunehe lyehi mu zuvo ya Tata.
Omu nangukatwama mu nganda ya mwilu
Na vivevo vyosena vya kufwa cove.

title: MU LIFUCI LYA MWILU
subtitle: In the Land of Fadeless Day
author: unknown

title: TUMONE YESU ATWIJILE
subtitle: We Would See Jesus
author: unknown
verses: Uze wa ku nganda yenyi ya mwilu,
Mwomwo ku mazu enyi nambe ngwenyi,

title: OMU NATUKAUNGILA MWILU
subtitle: When We Gather at Last
author: unknown
verses: Ku ngenge ya kalwiji wa mwono

title: COSENA NANGUKAHETA MWILU
subtitle: When All My Labours and Trials
author: unknown

title: KWATWAMA LUFUCI LYA MWILU
subtitle: In the Sweet Bye and Bye
author: unknown

title: MWANGANA WETU YESU
subtitle: By and By We’ll See the King
author: unknown

title: HAYA MYAKA NENYI
subtitle: In the Sweet By and By
author: unknown

title: COSENA VEVWILE PUHO
subtitle: Listen to the Vioce of Jesus
author: unknown
verses: Neji ja lelo neji ja ku myaka.

title: ITAVILENU VANYIKE
author: unknown
verses: Vezenga kuli Ami, vezenga kuli Ami.
Mwomwo lifuci lya mwilu linapu lyavo.

title: ETU TUVANYIKE KAHA
subtitle: We Are but Little Children Weak
author: unknown
